title: Particle Packs
description: Add your own custom particles with a resource pack.
body:
Add your own particles with custom animations and behavior through a resource pack

Particle Packs!

This is a standalone version of a system found in biome particle weather.

Add your own particles with custom animations and behavior with no programming knowledge needed

This mod is client sided and thus can be used on servers.

Documentation on how to make a particle pack [here](https://github.com/shadowmaster435/Impactful_Weather/wiki)
